goal: Attention queue resolve/defer mutations — backend endpoints dispatching to underlying tables

acceptance_criteria.description: PATCH /api/v1/migration/engagements/{id}/attention/{itemId}/resolve endpoint accepts {source: 'RISK'|'RECONCILIATION', resolution_note: string}. For RISK source, sets migration.risk.status to 'CLOSED' and records resolved_by from JWT sub claim. For RECONCILIATION source, sets migration.reconciliation.resolved to true with resolved_by and resolution_note.

PATCH /api/v1/migration/engagements/{id}/attention/{itemId}/defer endpoint accepts {source: 'RISK'|'RECONCILIATION', resolution_note: string}. For RISK source, sets migration.risk.status to 'DEFERRED'. For RECONCILIATION source, sets migration.reconciliation.resolved to false with resolution_note recording deferral reason.
Only unresolved items can be resolved or deferred — attempting on an already-resolved risk (status=CLOSED) or reconciliation (resolved=true) returns 409 Conflict
Invalid source value returns 400 Bad Request. Item not found returns 404.
Both endpoints require auth middleware and editor-or-above role. Unauthorized returns 403.
WebSocket broadcasts attention_resolved and attention_deferred events with item ID and source to engagement members
Activity log event created for each resolve/defer action with actor, item ID, source, and resolution_note

critical: PATCH endpoints use auth middleware — editor or owner role required
Resolve/defer dispatches to correct underlying table based on source field (risk vs reconciliation)
RLS enforced — risk table scoped via engagement_id, reconciliation via batch.engagement_id join
resolved_by comes from JWT sub claim, not request body
Only unresolved items can transition — enforce at DB query level with WHERE clause, not just handler
high: WebSocket broadcasts attention_resolved/attention_deferred to engagement members
Tests cover: resolve RISK success, resolve RECONCILIATION success, defer both, already-resolved (409), unauthorized (403), not-found (404), invalid source (400)
Activity log event created for audit trail
No new migration file needed — operates on existing risk and reconciliation tables
medium: Bulk resolve/defer endpoint for multiple items in one request
